title: Elissaios #1666
definition:
Eliseus or Elisha = "God his salvation"

 1) a distinguished OT prophet, the disciple, companion, and successor
    of Elijah
nasbUsage:
Definition: Eliseus or Elisha = "God his salvation"

 1) a distinguished OT prophet, the disciple, companion, and successor
    of Elijah

    NASB:  Elisha, an Isr. prophet:
